visible_entities.desc: person with fair skin, wearing a blue short-sleeved shirt, holding a large red and black backpack overhead
large red and black hiking backpack, appearing bulky
green leafy trees and bushes lining the riverbank
dark, calm water surface with reflections
semi-transparent watermark text 'shutterstock' in white font

atomic_facts.fact: A person is wading through deep water.
The person is holding a large red and black backpack above their head to keep it dry.
The water level reaches the person's chest.
The text 'shutterstock' is visible as a watermark over the center of the image.

spatial: The person is in the center of the frame, surrounded by the dark water. The red and black backpack is held directly above the person's head. The green trees are in the background, behind the person and the water. The watermark text is overlaid in front of the person and the water.
state_changes: person and backpack appear in river scene, wading with backpack held overhead

visible_entities.desc: person wearing a blue outfit or waders, carrying a large red and black backpack
calm, murky river water with ripples
dense green trees and bushes lining the riverbanks

atomic_facts.fact: A person is standing in the middle of the river.
The person is carrying a large backpack on their back.
The river is surrounded by a forest with green foliage.
The water surface shows slight ripples.

spatial: The person is standing in the river, positioned centrally in the frame. The dense green trees are behind the person and line the banks on both sides of the water. The water is in the foreground, extending towards the person in the background.
state_changes: person standing in river carrying backpack (posture change from wading/overhead)
